_comment: Guardrail for this repo: permissions.deny hard-blocks Edit/Write to the READ-ONLY upstream repos llm-d/, llm-d-benchmark/, and llm-d-skills/ (permission RULES from project settings ARE honored). NOTE: project-settings `hooks` do NOT fire on this host — verified 2026-06-29: an in-repo PreToolUse(Bash) pytest/ruff deny lived here but never triggered, so the agent kept running pytest anyway. The former in-repo PreToolUse hooks were therefore removed as dead config. The 'don't run pytest/ruff/make test|lint by hand — they run via the git pre-commit hook at the merge to main' rule is now enforced by the GLOBAL ~/.claude/hooks/block_local_test_lint.sh PreToolUse(Bash) hook; the read-only-repo edit guard needs no hook (the permissions.deny above covers it).
